---
title: "Supplemental Materials"
author: ""
listing:
  - id: sm_2026
    contents: sm_2026.yml
    sort: "date desc"
    template: ../html/supp_materials/listing.ejs

title-block-banner: "#118230"
page-layout: full
toc: true
toc-location: right
toc-title: Year
date-format: "MMMM D, YYYY"
---

This page contains the supplemental materials for projects that I've worked on.

::: {.callout-note}
### Copyright

Except where noted, all content is © Lucas Watson and licensed under [Creative Commons](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-sa/4.0/).
:::

## 2026

:::{#sm_2026}
:::
